user_query:
I run a local yarn shop that sponsors our knitting club. Please help me get May reminders scheduled and tidy up follow-ups from our last meeting using the files in this workspace.

What I need delivered:

1) Fix and run the reminder scheduler so it produces a schedule for May events.
- Inspect tools/reminder_scheduler.py and config/reminders.yaml. If the keys in the YAML don’t match what the script expects, update the YAML (not the code) so it runs correctly.
- Use the existing inputs (config/reminders.yaml and input/events.csv) and generate a CSV at out/scheduled_reminders.csv.
- The output must include one row per reminder with columns: event_name, event_date (YYYY-MM-DD), channel, send_date (YYYY-MM-DD), template_path. Only include events with status=planned whose event_date falls within the YAML-defined window. Compute send_date by subtracting each days_before offset from the event_date as the script intends.

2) Prepare meeting minutes and extract action items from the raw notes.
- Source: input/meeting_2026-04-13_raw.md.
- Create a minutes file at out/meeting_minutes_2026-04-13.md with three top-level sections: Attendees, Decisions, Action Items. Pull decisions and action items from the [DECISION] and [ACTION owner:... due:YYYY-MM-DD] tags in the raw notes.
- Also produce out/action_items_2026-04-13.csv with columns: owner, task, due_date (YYYY-MM-DD), status. Set status to "open" for each item.

3) Update the reminder email template with sponsor info and a supply list for the Charity Blanket Drive.
- Start with input/templates/reminder_email_template.md and keep all other text intact.
- Replace the <!-- SPONSOR_BLURB --> placeholder with the contents of input/sponsor_blurb.md.
- Replace the <!-- SUPPLY_LIST: EVENT=Charity Blanket Drive --> placeholder with a bullet list built from input/materials_inventory.csv, including only rows where event == "Charity Blanket Drive" and include_in_email == "yes" (case-insensitive). For each included row, format a bullet as: "- {item} — {quantity} {unit}".
- Save the updated template to out/templates/reminder_email_template_updated.md.

Please keep paths and filenames exactly as specified above so I can verify the results locally. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
